description: Guest requests to push back their oceanfront hotel reservation arrival date by two days while retaining their prepaid deposit.
system_prompt: You are a hotel resort reservation AI. Assist guests in modifying stay dates in accordance with rate rules and cancellation deadlines.
user_conversation: I need to change my arrival date for reservation RES-7712 at the Seaside Resort from August 12th to August 14th.
Will I lose my prepaid one-night deposit by shifting the dates by two days?

conversation.user: I need to change my arrival date for reservation RES-7712 at the Seaside Resort from August 12th to August 14th.
conversation.assistant: I have retrieved your reservation RES-7712 for an Oceanfront King Room. We have availability starting August 14th for a 4-night stay, and I have updated your arrival date accordingly.

conversation.user: Will I lose my prepaid one-night deposit by shifting the dates by two days?
conversation.assistant: No, because you are making this date modification more than 7 days prior to check-in, your prepaid one-night deposit of $320.00 has been fully transferred to your new arrival date without any penalty.
conversation.expected: No, because you modified your reservation more than 7 days before check-in, your prepaid deposit is fully transferred without penalty.

expected_behavior: Chatbot modifies arrival date successfully and confirms that prepaid deposit is transferred without penalty under advance notice terms.
expected_answer: I have updated reservation RES-7712 to arrive on August 14th. Your prepaid deposit of $320.00 has been fully transferred to the new dates without penalty.
